title: taraxacum atroviride
intro: Taraxacum atroviride, also known as the dark-leaved dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. This plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum atroviride include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural diuretic, making it useful for treating conditions such as urinary tract infections and high blood pressure. Taraxacum atroviride can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for consumption.
